SEARCH
Package model

Class Village

java.lang.Object
model.Village
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Village extends Object implements Serializable
Village class for taking care of all ArrayLists and basically connecting everything in model
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Village()
    no-argument constructor; that is meant to initialize all the data with greenpoints set to 0 and reset period set to 10;

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenactivity)
    Add a greenActivity to CatalogueOfIdeas It also checks if the addedGreen activity is not in the catalogueOfIdeas The points of the activity are added to the GreenGoal
    void
    addGreenGoal(GreenGoal goal)
    Add a greenGoal to the goals It also checks if the added goal is in the goals to make sure for no copies
    void
    addResetPeriod(int period)
    sets period to the period field (int) and also stores the day of the calling (using Date.today()) to the setdate field (Date)
    void
    addSharedTask(SharedTask sharedtask)
    Adds or updates a SharedTask in the list.
    boolean
    addTradeOffer(TradeOffer tradeOffer)
     
    boolean
    addVillager(Villager villager)
    adds villager to village
    void
    changeVillager(Villager old, Villager villager)
     
    int
    checkReset()
    checks if today is the day of the reset if it is --> it calls resetNow() and resets the villagers --> also returns -1 if it isn't --> checks how many days are left until reset and returns the value
    ArrayList<TradeOffer>
    copytradeswithoutpos()
    copies trades without their associated possiblebuyers
    void
    editGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenactivityOld, GreenActivity greenactivityNew)
    Edit a greenActivity from the GreenActivityList
    boolean
    editTradeOffer(TradeOffer old, TradeOffer trade)
     
    void
    finishGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenActivity)
    Finish a greenActivity from the GreenActivityList
    void
    finishGreenGoal(GreenGoal greengoal)
    Sets the greenDescription of this GreenGoal
    void
    finishSharedTask(SharedTask sharedtask1)
    Finalizes a SharedTask by distributing its points among all performers.
    void
    finishTradeOffer(TradeOffer tradeOffer, Villager buyer)
     
    GreenGoal
    getActiveGreenGoal()
    Gets the Village's activeGreenGoal.
    int
    getAveragePoints()
    return the average of the personalpoints of all villagers used in Villager clas to check if a villager is above or below average --> used in SharedTask class to check if a bonus is needed
    String
    getDescription()
    returns description of the village
    ArrayList<GreenGoal>
    getGoals()
    Gets the ArrayList goals from Village
    ArrayList<GreenActivity>
    getGreenActivities()
     
    int
    getGreenpoints()
    Gets the Village's greenPoints.
    ArrayList<SharedTask>
    getSharedTasks()
     
    ArrayList<TradeOffer>
    getTrades()
    returns list of active trades
    ArrayList<Villager>
    getVillagers()
    returns list of villagers in village
    void
    removeGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenactivity)
    Remove a greenActivity from the GreenActivityList and CatalogueOfIdeas It also checks if the addedGreen activity is in the catalogueOfIdeas and removes it if it is
    void
    removeGreenGoal(GreenGoal greengoal)
    Remove a GreenGoal from the goals
    boolean
    removeTradeOffer(TradeOffer tradeOffer)
     
    boolean
    removeVillager(Villager villager)
    removes villager (and it's associated trades through the removeTradesWithVillager() helper method) from village
    void
    resetnow()
    adds the villagers' personal points to the green pool (greenpoints) and sets the personal points to 0
    void
    setActiveGreenGoal(GreenGoal activeGreenGoal)
    Sets the activeGreenGoal to this GreenGoal
    void
    setDescription(String description)
     
    void
    setGreenpoints(int greenpoints)
    Sets the greenpoints of this GreenGoal
    String
    toString()
     

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Village

      public Village()
      no-argument constructor; that is meant to initialize all the data with greenpoints set to 0 and reset period set to 10;

  • Method Details

    • copytradeswithoutpos

      public ArrayList<TradeOffer> copytradeswithoutpos()
      copies trades without their associated possiblebuyers
      Returns:
      toreturn - ArrayList goes through trades and uses the TradeOffer.copywithoutpos() for each trade and returns those values --> used for JSON

    • getGreenpoints

      public int getGreenpoints()
      Gets the Village's greenPoints.
      Returns:
      the Village's greenPoints.

    • getActiveGreenGoal

      public GreenGoal getActiveGreenGoal()
      Gets the Village's activeGreenGoal.
      Returns:
      the Village's activeGreenGoal.

    • setActiveGreenGoal

      public void setActiveGreenGoal(GreenGoal activeGreenGoal)
      Sets the activeGreenGoal to this GreenGoal
      Parameters:
      activeGreenGoal - - the Village's activeGreenGoal

    • addVillager

      public boolean addVillager(Villager villager)
      adds villager to village
      Parameters:
      villager - - what villager to add check if villager is inside the ArrayList of villagers if not --> add villager

    • removeVillager

      public boolean removeVillager(Villager villager)
      removes villager (and it's associated trades through the removeTradesWithVillager() helper method) from village
      Parameters:
      villager - - what villager to remove check if villager is inside the ArrayList of villagers if so --> remove villager and associated trades

    • changeVillager

      public void changeVillager(Villager old, Villager villager)
      Parameters:
      old - - villager to edit
      villager - - what to change it to finds villager (old) in ArrayList of villagers and changes its values to the new one's

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String description)
      Parameters:
      description - (String) sets description field

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      returns description of the village
      Returns:
      description field (String)

    • getVillagers

      public ArrayList<Villager> getVillagers()
      returns list of villagers in village
      Returns:
      villagers field (ArrayList)

    • getTrades

      public ArrayList<TradeOffer> getTrades()
      returns list of active trades
      Returns:
      trades field (ArrayList)

    • addTradeOffer

      public boolean addTradeOffer(TradeOffer tradeOffer)

    • removeTradeOffer

      public boolean removeTradeOffer(TradeOffer tradeOffer)
      Parameters:
      tradeOffer - - trade to remove checks if trade is in ArrayList of trades and if so removes it

    • editTradeOffer

      public boolean editTradeOffer(TradeOffer old, TradeOffer trade)
      Parameters:
      old - - trade to edit
      trade - - what to change it to finds trade (old) in ArrayList of trades and changes its values to the new one's

    • finishTradeOffer

      public void finishTradeOffer(TradeOffer tradeOffer, Villager buyer)
      Parameters:
      tradeOffer - - trade to finish
      buyer - - buyer to finish the trade finds trade in ArrayList of active trades and removes it finds buyer and seller villager in ArrayList of villagers and does the point exchange

    • getAveragePoints

      public int getAveragePoints()
      return the average of the personalpoints of all villagers used in Villager clas to check if a villager is above or below average --> used in SharedTask class to check if a bonus is needed

    • addResetPeriod

      public void addResetPeriod(int period)
      sets period to the period field (int) and also stores the day of the calling (using Date.today()) to the setdate field (Date)

    • checkReset

      public int checkReset()
      checks if today is the day of the reset if it is --> it calls resetNow() and resets the villagers --> also returns -1 if it isn't --> checks how many days are left until reset and returns the value

    • resetnow

      public void resetnow()
      adds the villagers' personal points to the green pool (greenpoints) and sets the personal points to 0

    • addGreenGoal

      public void addGreenGoal(GreenGoal goal)
      Add a greenGoal to the goals It also checks if the added goal is in the goals to make sure for no copies
      Parameters:
      goal - GreenGoal

    • getGreenActivities

      public ArrayList<GreenActivity> getGreenActivities()

    • addGreenActivity

      public void addGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenactivity)
      Add a greenActivity to CatalogueOfIdeas It also checks if the addedGreen activity is not in the catalogueOfIdeas The points of the activity are added to the GreenGoal
      Parameters:
      greenactivity - GreenActivity

    • removeGreenActivity

      public void removeGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenactivity)
      Remove a greenActivity from the GreenActivityList and CatalogueOfIdeas It also checks if the addedGreen activity is in the catalogueOfIdeas and removes it if it is
      Parameters:
      greenactivity - GreenActivity

    • editGreenActivity

      public void editGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenactivityOld, GreenActivity greenactivityNew)
      Edit a greenActivity from the GreenActivityList
      Parameters:
      greenactivityOld - GreenActivity
      greenactivityNew - GreenActivity It takes the values of greenactivityNew and replace them with greenactivityOld

    • addSharedTask

      public void addSharedTask(SharedTask sharedtask)
      Adds or updates a SharedTask in the list. If a task with the same name already exists, its performers and pointsare updated instead of adding a duplicate entry.
      Parameters:
      sharedtask - the SharedTask to add or update

    • finishSharedTask

      public void finishSharedTask(SharedTask sharedtask1)
      Finalizes a SharedTask by distributing its points among all performers. Each performer receives an equal share of the task's points, but those who are below the current average receive a 20% bonus. If the task has no performers, the method exits without making changes.
      Parameters:
      sharedtask1 - the SharedTask to finalize and award points for

    • getGoals

      public ArrayList<GreenGoal> getGoals()
      Gets the ArrayList goals from Village
      Returns:
      the ArrayList goals

    • removeGreenGoal

      public void removeGreenGoal(GreenGoal greengoal)
      Remove a GreenGoal from the goals
      Parameters:
      greengoal - GreenGoal

    • finishGreenGoal

      public void finishGreenGoal(GreenGoal greengoal)
      Sets the greenDescription of this GreenGoal

    • setGreenpoints

      public void setGreenpoints(int greenpoints)
      Sets the greenpoints of this GreenGoal
      Parameters:
      greenpoints - the Village's greenPoints

    • finishGreenActivity

      public void finishGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenActivity)
      Finish a greenActivity from the GreenActivityList
      Parameters:
      greenActivity - GreenActivity's Adds the points to the GreenGoal

    • getSharedTasks

      public ArrayList<SharedTask> getSharedTasks()

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string representation of Village It will return a string of the ArrayList of Villagers, return the total amount of greenPoints a string of the ArrayList of Trades, a string of the ArrayList of CatalogueOfIdeas a string of the ArrayList of SharedTask a string of the ArrayList of AvailableGoals
